subtopics.name: Mathematical argument and notation
subtopics.blurb: Implication, equivalence and the language of proof.

subtopics.name: Complex numbers: arithmetic
subtopics.blurb: Four operations on complex numbers; conjugates; modulus; quadratics with complex roots.

subtopics.name: Ordering and comparing numbers
subtopics.blurb: Order integers, decimals and fractions and compare them with $=,\neq,<,>,\leq,\geq$.

subtopics.name: Proof by deduction and exhaustion
subtopics.blurb: Direct algebraic proof and finite-case exhaustion.

subtopics.name: Complex roots of polynomials
subtopics.blurb: Quadratics, cubics and quartics with real coefficients and complex roots; conjugate-pair arguments.

subtopics.name: Four operations and place value
subtopics.blurb: Formal written methods for integers, decimals and money, and the meaning of each digit's place value.

subtopics.name: Disproof by counterexample
subtopics.blurb: Refuting universal claims with one counterexample.

subtopics.name: Argand diagrams
subtopics.blurb: Modulus and argument; mod–arg form; geometric interpretation; basic loci.

subtopics.name: Negative numbers
subtopics.blurb: Calculate with directed numbers across all four operations, in and out of context, using number lines and sign rules.

subtopics.name: Indices and surds
subtopics.blurb: Rational indices and rationalising surds.

subtopics.name: Loci and regions
subtopics.blurb: Circles $|z-a|=r$, perpendicular bisectors, argument rays; shaded regions; extremising $|z|$ and $\arg z$.

subtopics.name: Priority of operations
subtopics.blurb: Apply BIDMAS — brackets, indices and roots, then $\times\div$, then $+-$ — to evaluate expressions correctly.

subtopics.name: Quadratic functions
subtopics.blurb: Completing the square, the discriminant and sketching.

subtopics.name: Roots of polynomials
subtopics.blurb: Root–coefficient relations for quadratics to quartics; sums of powers; forming equations from roots.

subtopics.name: Factors, multiples and primes
subtopics.blurb: Find factors, multiples and primes, and work out the HCF and LCM by listing.

subtopics.name: Simultaneous equations
subtopics.blurb: Linear and linear-quadratic systems and intersections.

subtopics.name: Transforming roots
subtopics.blurb: New polynomials whose roots are shifts, scales, reciprocals and other linear transforms of given roots.

subtopics.name: Prime factorisation
subtopics.blurb: Write numbers as a product of primes in index form and use this to find the HCF and LCM.

subtopics.name: Inequalities
subtopics.blurb: Linear, quadratic and set-notation solution regions.

subtopics.name: Proof by induction
subtopics.blurb: Induction for series, divisibility, inequalities, matrix powers, and strong induction.

subtopics.name: Systematic listing
subtopics.blurb: List every outcome or arrangement in a clear order, without omission or repetition, then count them.

subtopics.name: Polynomials and factor theorem
subtopics.blurb: Division, the factor and remainder theorems, and factorising cubics.

subtopics.name: Matrix arithmetic and determinants
subtopics.blurb: Operations; 2×2 and 3×3 determinants and inverses; solving AX = B.

subtopics.name: Product rule for counting
subtopics.blurb: Count combinations of choices with the product rule ($m\times n$), including arrangements and restrictions.

subtopics.name: Curve sketching
subtopics.blurb: Cubics, quartics, reciprocals, intersections and repeated roots.

subtopics.name: Determinants and inverses
subtopics.blurb: 2×2 and 3×3 determinants and inverses; singularity; det(AB) and (AB)⁻¹ properties.

subtopics.name: Transformations of graphs
subtopics.blurb: Translations, stretches and reflections of standard curves.

subtopics.name: Systems of linear equations
subtopics.blurb: Matrix solution of three simultaneous equations; consistency; geometric configurations of three planes.

subtopics.name: Straight lines
subtopics.blurb: Gradient, midpoint, distance, parallel/perpendicular lines and modelling.

subtopics.name: Linear transformations
subtopics.blurb: Rotation, reflection, enlargement and shear matrices; composites; invariant points and lines.

subtopics.name: Circles
subtopics.blurb: Centre–radius equation, completing the square, tangents and chords.

subtopics.name: Invariant points and lines
subtopics.blurb: Invariant points; invariant lines and lines of invariant points of 2D matrix transformations.

subtopics.name: Binomial expansion
subtopics.blurb: The binomial theorem, nCr coefficients, specific terms and approximations.

subtopics.name: Series
subtopics.blurb: Standard results for Σr, Σr² and Σr³; linear combinations, partial sums and proofs.

subtopics.name: Triangle trigonometry
subtopics.blurb: Sine and cosine rules, the area formula, bearings and the ambiguous case.

subtopics.name: Vectors: lines and planes
subtopics.blurb: Vector and Cartesian equations of lines and planes in 3D; intersections and conversions.

subtopics.name: Trigonometric graphs
subtopics.blurb: Graphs of sin, cos and tan; period, amplitude, transformations and solving.

subtopics.name: Scalar product methods
subtopics.blurb: Angles between lines and planes; perpendicularity and parallelism via the scalar product.

subtopics.name: Identities and equations
subtopics.blurb: The Pythagorean and tan identities, proving identities and solving trig equations.

subtopics.name: Intersections and distances
subtopics.blurb: Line and plane intersections; perpendicular distances point–line, point–plane and between skew lines; reflections.

subtopics.name: Exponential functions
subtopics.blurb: Graphs of aˣ and eˣ, transformations and the gradient property of eᵏˣ.

subtopics.name: Volumes of revolution
subtopics.blurb: Rotation about the $x$- and $y$-axes; washers and composite regions; modelling solids.

subtopics.name: Logarithms
subtopics.blurb: Logarithm as inverse, laws of logs, solving aˣ = b and log-linear modelling.

subtopics.name: Momentum and impulse
subtopics.blurb: Impulse–momentum principle and conservation of momentum for direct motion in a line.

subtopics.name: Exponential modelling
subtopics.blurb: Growth and decay models, using ln to solve, half-life, and reduction to linear log-form.

subtopics.name: Impulse and momentum in 2D
subtopics.blurb: Impulse and momentum as vectors; conservation in two dimensions; oblique impacts and jerk problems.

subtopics.name: First principles and derivatives
subtopics.blurb: The derivative as a gradient and rate of change; differentiating xⁿ from first principles.

subtopics.name: Work, energy and power
subtopics.blurb: Work, kinetic and potential energy; work–energy principle; power, including on inclines.

subtopics.name: Tangents and normals
subtopics.blurb: Using dy/dx to find tangent and normal lines, points of contact, intersections and axis-crossing geometry.

subtopics.name: Elastic strings and springs
subtopics.blurb: Hooke's law for strings and springs; tension and thrust; equilibrium with elastic components.

subtopics.name: Increasing, decreasing, stationary points
subtopics.blurb: Increasing/decreasing intervals, locating stationary points, and classifying them with the second derivative.

subtopics.name: Elastic energy
subtopics.blurb: Elastic potential energy; energy conservation and the work–energy principle with elastic strings and springs.

subtopics.name: Optimisation
subtopics.blurb: Setting up and solving practical maximum and minimum problems with calculus.

subtopics.name: Elastic collisions in one dimension
subtopics.blurb: Newton's law of restitution; direct impacts and rebounds from smooth walls; kinetic energy loss.

subtopics.name: Indefinite integration
subtopics.blurb: Antidifferentiation, integrating powers of x, and finding the constant from a point.

subtopics.name: Successive collisions
subtopics.blurb: Successive direct impacts between spheres and with walls; conditions for further collisions.

subtopics.name: Definite integration and areas
subtopics.blurb: Evaluating definite integrals and finding areas between curves, lines and the x-axis.

subtopics.name: Discrete random variables
subtopics.blurb: Expectation and variance; $E(aX+b)$, $\operatorname{Var}(aX+b)$; functions of $X$.

subtopics.name: Vector basics
subtopics.blurb: Magnitude, direction and unit vectors, using i, j and column notation.

subtopics.name: The Poisson distribution
subtopics.blurb: Conditions; mean and variance; additivity; approximation to the binomial.

subtopics.name: Vector geometry
subtopics.blurb: Position vectors, distance, midpoints, ratios, collinearity and mechanics links.

subtopics.name: Geometric and negative binomial
subtopics.blurb: Trials until the first and $r$th success; PMFs, means, variances and modelling.

subtopics.name: Modelling in mechanics
subtopics.blurb: SI units, scalars and vectors, modelling assumptions and setting up mechanics models.

subtopics.name: Hypothesis testing (Poisson, geometric)
subtopics.blurb: Tests for Poisson and geometric parameters; critical regions and actual significance levels.

subtopics.name: Kinematics graphs
subtopics.blurb: Displacement–time and velocity–time graphs: reading gradients for velocity and acceleration, and areas for distance.

subtopics.name: Quality of tests
subtopics.blurb: Type I and Type II errors; size and power of a test; power functions.

subtopics.name: Constant acceleration
subtopics.blurb: The suvat equations: selecting and applying them, and vertical motion under gravity.

subtopics.name: Central limit theorem
subtopics.blurb: Distribution of sample means for large samples; approximate inference.

subtopics.name: Variable acceleration
subtopics.blurb: Calculus links between displacement, velocity and acceleration: differentiating, integrating, and total distance.

subtopics.name: Chi-squared goodness of fit
subtopics.blurb: Goodness of fit to discrete uniform, binomial, Poisson and geometric models; pooling classes; degrees of freedom.

subtopics.name: Forces and Newton's laws
subtopics.blurb: Force diagrams, resultants and F = ma: motion in 1D and 2D, weight and Newton's laws.

subtopics.name: Contingency tables
subtopics.blurb: Chi-squared tests of independence; expected frequencies; degrees of freedom $(r-1)(c-1)$.

subtopics.name: Connected particles
subtopics.blurb: Newton's third law: tow-bars, lifts and pulleys — finding shared acceleration, tension and thrust.

subtopics.name: Probability generating functions
subtopics.blurb: PGFs of standard discrete distributions; mean and variance from $G(t)$; sums of independent variables.

subtopics.name: Exponential form
subtopics.blurb: $re^{i\theta}$ form; multiplication and division; the geometric effect of multiplying by a complex number.

subtopics.name: Sampling
subtopics.blurb: Census vs sample; simple random, systematic, stratified, quota and opportunity sampling.

subtopics.name: Combinations of random variables
subtopics.blurb: Means and variances of sums, differences and scaled combinations; independent variables and covariance.

subtopics.name: De Moivre's theorem
subtopics.blurb: Statement and proof by induction; integer powers and $n$th roots of complex numbers.

subtopics.name: Measures of location and spread
subtopics.blurb: Mean, median, mode, quartiles, range and IQR; variance and standard deviation; linear coding.

subtopics.name: Multiple-angle identities
subtopics.blurb: Expressing $\cos n\theta$ and $\sin n\theta$ in powers of trig functions; equations and integration.

subtopics.name: Data presentation
subtopics.blurb: Histograms, cumulative frequency and box plots; outliers, skewness and comparing distributions.

subtopics.name: Trigonometric series
subtopics.blurb: Sums of trigonometric series via geometric series of complex exponentials ($C + iS$ method).

subtopics.name: Correlation and regression
subtopics.blurb: Scatter diagrams and correlation, the least-squares regression line, prediction, interpolation vs extrapolation and coding.

subtopics.name: Roots of unity
subtopics.blurb: $n$th roots of unity and of any complex number; geometric interpretation and regular polygons.

subtopics.name: Linear regression
subtopics.blurb: Least-squares regression lines, prediction, residuals, interpolation, extrapolation and the limits of linear models.

subtopics.name: Probability
subtopics.blurb: Sample spaces and the complement rule, two- and three-set Venn diagrams, mutually exclusive and independent events, and probability tree diagrams.

subtopics.name: Series: method of differences
subtopics.blurb: Telescoping sums, including with partial fractions.

subtopics.name: Discrete random variables
subtopics.blurb: Probability distributions and mass functions, the sum-to-one condition, cumulative distribution functions, and the discrete uniform distribution.

subtopics.name: Maclaurin series
subtopics.blurb: Series for $e^{x}$, $\ln(1+x)$, $\sin x$, $\cos x$, $(1+x)^{n}$; validity; series of composites.

subtopics.name: The binomial distribution
subtopics.blurb: The binomial model X ~ B(n, p) and its conditions, the probability formula, cumulative probabilities and modelling.

subtopics.name: Improper integrals and mean value
subtopics.blurb: Improper integrals over infinite intervals or singular endpoints, convergence checks, and mean values of functions.

subtopics.name: Hypothesis testing
subtopics.blurb: Binomial hypothesis tests: null and alternative hypotheses, one- and two-tailed tests, critical regions, p-values and conclusions in context.

subtopics.name: Volumes: parametric and modelling
subtopics.blurb: Volumes of revolution for parametrically defined curves; washers, composite solids and modelling assumptions.

subtopics.name: Large data set fluency
subtopics.blurb: The Edexcel weather large data set: its structure, variables, units and conventions, and applying Year-1 statistics to weather-data extracts.

subtopics.name: Further integration
subtopics.blurb: Partial fractions with quadratic factors, arctangent forms, and harder substitutions for rational integrals.

subtopics.name: Proof by contradiction
subtopics.blurb: Assuming the negation to force a contradiction: irrational surds, the infinitude of primes and non-existence proofs.

subtopics.name: Inverse trigonometric calculus
subtopics.blurb: Differentiating and integrating inverse trigonometric functions; exact definite integrals, tangents and integration by parts.

subtopics.name: Algebraic and partial fractions
subtopics.blurb: Simplifying and combining rational expressions, then splitting them into partial fractions over distinct, repeated and improper factors.

subtopics.name: Polar coordinates
subtopics.blurb: Polar-Cartesian conversion, polar equations, curve features, intersections and sketching polar curves.

subtopics.name: Functions and their graphs
subtopics.blurb: Domain and range, composite and inverse functions, and the modulus function with its equations and graphs.

subtopics.name: Polar areas and tangents
subtopics.blurb: Areas enclosed by polar curves, regions between curves, and tangents parallel or perpendicular to the initial line.

subtopics.name: Further transformations
subtopics.blurb: Combining translations, stretches and reflections, tracking their order and their effect on domain, range, asymptotes and key points.

subtopics.name: Hyperbolic functions
subtopics.blurb: Definitions of sinh, cosh and tanh; identities, equations, calculus and inverse hyperbolic forms.

subtopics.name: Arithmetic sequences and series
subtopics.blurb: The nth term and sum formulae, sigma notation, finding a and d from conditions, and arithmetic modelling.

subtopics.name: Hyperbolic calculus
subtopics.blurb: Differentiating and integrating hyperbolic and inverse hyperbolic functions, including exact definite integrals.

subtopics.name: Geometric sequences and series
subtopics.blurb: The nth term and sum formulae, convergence and the sum to infinity, finding a and r from conditions, and geometric modelling.

subtopics.name: First-order differential equations
subtopics.blurb: Separable equations, integrating factors, initial value problems, solution families and modelling contexts.

subtopics.name: Recurrence and general sequences
subtopics.blurb: Generating terms from recurrence relations, sigma notation, periodic and monotonic sequences, and the limits of convergent recurrences.

subtopics.name: Modelling with differential equations
subtopics.blurb: Constructing and solving differential-equation models for growth, decay, cooling, mixing, resistance and logistic behaviour.

subtopics.name: Binomial expansion (rational powers)
subtopics.blurb: Expanding (1 + x)^n for negative and fractional n, the validity condition, the (a + bx)^n form, approximations and combining with partial fractions.

subtopics.name: Coupled differential equations
subtopics.blurb: Solving first-order coupled systems using normal modes, triangular substitution, stability and elimination.

subtopics.name: Radians, arcs and sectors
subtopics.blurb: Radian measure and exact values, arc length rθ and sector area ½r²θ, perimeters, segments and solving trig equations in radians.

subtopics.name: Second-order differential equations
subtopics.blurb: Solving constant-coefficient second-order equations, including complementary functions, particular integrals, conditions and resonance.

subtopics.name: Small angle approximations
subtopics.blurb: For small θ in radians: sinθ ≈ θ, tanθ ≈ θ, cosθ ≈ 1 − ½θ², their validity, and using them to estimate values and simplify limiting expressions.

subtopics.name: Confidence intervals
subtopics.blurb: Confidence intervals for a population mean using normal and t-distributions; margins of error and interpretation.

subtopics.name: Reciprocal and inverse trig functions
subtopics.blurb: The reciprocal functions sec, cosec and cot and their graphs, the identities 1 + tan²θ = sec²θ and 1 + cot²θ = cosec²θ, solving equations, and the inverse functions arcsin, arccos and arctan.

subtopics.name: Horizontal circular motion
subtopics.blurb: Angular speed, centripetal acceleration and force, conical pendulums, flat bends and banked tracks.

subtopics.name: Compound and double angles
subtopics.blurb: The addition formulae for sin, cos and tan, the double-angle formulae, exact values, proving identities, and solving equations that need a compound- or double-angle step.

subtopics.name: Vertical circular motion
subtopics.blurb: Energy methods, radial force equations, tension, slack strings and conditions for complete circles.

subtopics.name: The form Rsin(θ + α)
subtopics.blurb: Writing a sinθ ± b cosθ as a single wave R sin(θ ± α) or R cos(θ ± α), then using it to solve equations, find maxima and minima without calculus, and model oscillations.

subtopics.name: Centres of mass: laminas
subtopics.blurb: Uniform and composite laminas by symmetry, area moments and cut-out methods.

subtopics.name: Parametric curves
subtopics.blurb: Working with curves given parametrically: finding points, converting to Cartesian form by eliminating the parameter (including with trig identities), stating domains, and finding intersections.

subtopics.name: Centres of mass: frameworks
subtopics.blurb: Frameworks of rods and wires, including circular arcs; composite frameworks by moments.

subtopics.name: Parametric modelling
subtopics.blurb: Modelling motion along a parametric path: position and time, velocity and speed via parametric differentiation, the gradient, tangent and normal to a trajectory, greatest height and range, and deciding whether two objects collide or their paths merely cross.

subtopics.name: Centres of mass: solids and calculus
subtopics.blurb: Standard solid centres of mass, composite solids, cut-outs and solids of revolution by integration.

subtopics.name: Standard derivatives
subtopics.blurb: The derivatives of eˣ, aˣ, ln x, sin x, cos x and tan x, and using them to find gradients, tangents, normals, stationary points and increasing/decreasing intervals.

subtopics.name: Statics of rigid bodies
subtopics.blurb: Equilibrium of rigid bodies, supports, suspension, ladders, sliding and toppling.

subtopics.name: Product, quotient and chain rules
subtopics.blurb: Differentiating products, quotients and compositions: the chain, product and quotient rules, the derivatives of sec, cosec and cot, and applying them to tangents, normals and stationary points.

subtopics.name: Oblique impact with a surface
subtopics.blurb: Oblique impact of a smooth sphere with a fixed surface; normal restitution, deflection angles and energy loss.

subtopics.name: Implicit differentiation
subtopics.blurb: Differentiating relations that are not given as y = f(x): the dy/dx factor on every y-term, the product rule on xy terms, and finding tangents, normals and stationary points of implicit curves.

subtopics.name: Oblique impact of spheres
subtopics.blurb: Oblique impacts of two smooth spheres; restitution along the line of centres, impulse and energy loss.

subtopics.name: Parametric differentiation
subtopics.blurb: Finding dy/dx from parametric equations using ẏ/ẋ, equations of tangents and normals to parametric curves, stationary and vertical tangent points, and the second derivative d²y/dx².

subtopics.name: Further dynamics
subtopics.blurb: Motion under variable forces, acceleration as $v\,dv/dx$, variable-force work-energy and inverse-square gravitation.

subtopics.name: Rates of change
subtopics.blurb: Connected rates of change via the chain rule: related rates for spheres, ladders, cones and rectangles, plus exponential growth and decay models.

subtopics.name: Unbiased estimators
subtopics.blurb: Estimators and sampling distributions; bias; unbiased estimators of $\mu$ and $\sigma^2$; comparing estimators by variance.

subtopics.name: Locating roots and iteration
subtopics.blurb: Change of sign and its failures; fixed-point iteration; staircase and cobweb diagrams; convergence via |g′(x)| < 1.

subtopics.name: Further hypothesis tests
subtopics.blurb: Tests for differences of means, paired and independent samples, F-tests for variances, and choosing an appropriate test.

subtopics.name: Newton–Raphson
subtopics.blurb: The Newton–Raphson formula from tangent geometry; iterating to refine roots; failure when f′(x) = 0 or the start is poor.

subtopics.name: Spearman's rank correlation
subtopics.blurb: Rank correlation coefficients, interpretation, significance tests and choosing rank methods over PMCC.

subtopics.name: Numerical integration
subtopics.blurb: The trapezium rule for estimating areas and integrals; over- and under-estimates from concavity; accuracy and percentage error.

subtopics.name: Continuous random variables
subtopics.blurb: PDFs and CDFs; expectation, variance, median, mode and functions of continuous random variables.

subtopics.name: Standard integrals
subtopics.blurb: Integrating eˣ, 1/x, trig functions and f(ax + b); finding constants of integration and evaluating definite integrals.

subtopics.name: The continuous uniform distribution
subtopics.blurb: Properties, moments and applications of the rectangular distribution.

subtopics.name: Second derivatives and curve behaviour
subtopics.blurb: Finding f″(x), classifying stationary points, concavity intervals, points of inflection, and full curve analysis.

subtopics.name: Combinations of random variables
subtopics.blurb: Means and variances of sums, differences and scaled combinations; independent variables and covariance.

subtopics.name: Integration by substitution
subtopics.blurb: Choosing u = g(x), changing limits for definite integrals, reverse chain rule, and trig/exponential substitutions.

subtopics.name: Inference for variance
subtopics.blurb: Chi-square confidence intervals and hypothesis tests for a normal population variance and standard deviation.

subtopics.name: Integration by parts
subtopics.blurb: The formula ∫ u dv = uv − ∫ v du: polynomial × exponential/trig, ∫ ln x dx, repeated application, and cyclic eˣ sin x integrals.

subtopics.name: Linear regression
subtopics.blurb: Least-squares model, residuals and the residual sum of squares; fitting, predicting and interpreting linear models.

subtopics.name: Integration with partial fractions
subtopics.blurb: Decomposing rational functions into partial fractions, then integrating: distinct and repeated linear factors, irreducible quadratics, and improper fractions.

subtopics.name: Areas and further applications
subtopics.blurb: Areas between curves, parametric integration, y-axis areas, and multi-step applications combining integration techniques.

subtopics.name: Differential equations
subtopics.blurb: Separation of variables; general and particular solutions; exponential growth and decay, Newton cooling, and logistic models.

subtopics.name: Vectors in three dimensions
subtopics.blurb: 3D coordinates, i, j, k notation, magnitude, distance, displacement, unit vectors, midpoints, parallel vectors and collinearity.

subtopics.name: Regression and correlation
subtopics.blurb: Exponential models via logarithms, the PMCC, hypothesis tests for zero correlation, and the coefficient of determination.

subtopics.name: Conditional probability
subtopics.blurb: P(A|B) from two-way tables, Venn diagrams and tree diagrams; the multiplication rule, law of total probability, and testing independence.

subtopics.name: The normal distribution
subtopics.blurb: The normal model N(μ, σ²): standardising to Z, finding probabilities and inverse-normal percentiles, and finding an unknown mean or standard deviation.

subtopics.name: Normal approximation to binomial
subtopics.blurb: Conditions and continuity corrections; approximating binomial probabilities with the normal; model choice.

subtopics.name: Hypothesis testing (normal)
subtopics.blurb: Tests for the population mean using the sample mean: hypotheses, z-test statistic, critical values, p-values and conclusions in context.

subtopics.name: Moments
subtopics.blurb: Turning effects, moment = force × distance, equilibrium of rods and beams, tilting, and simple centres of mass.

subtopics.name: Forces and friction
subtopics.blurb: Resolving on inclined planes, the friction law $F \leq \mu R$, limiting equilibrium, and connected particles on rough slopes.

subtopics.name: Projectiles
subtopics.blurb: Horizontal and angled projection: components, range, time of flight, maximum height, trajectory equations, and vector methods.

subtopics.name: Applications of forces
subtopics.blurb: Statics of particles, resolving and resultants, dynamics on slopes, connected bodies, lifts, tow-bars and pulley systems.

subtopics.name: Further kinematics
subtopics.blurb: Vector methods in 2D: position, velocity and acceleration vectors, differentiation and integration, speed, and variable acceleration.
